title: Legends and Creatures
description: You can change your player model between new races like werewolf, werefox and owlbeast etc.
body:
### Legends And Creatures

This mod adds a character creator (OPEN with the V key) where you can change the player model between:

-Werewolf

-Werefox

-Owlbeast

-Leporid (Rabbit)

-Bearfolk (Bear)

-Mephiborn(Skunk)

-Apocrita (bee)

 


#### You can even customize the model by changing the color of:

-eye #1 - 2

-body pattern #1 - 3


Every new race comes with a new animation for its movements.

#### Compability with: 

-Wildlife Expanded: Skunk Mod 1.4.1+

-Weaponmaster 3.0.6+

 

The mod is not compatible with other mods that change the player model or gives new layers to the player.
